stemHtml: A precision approach Category I lighting system shall consist of a row of lights on the extended centre line of the runway extending, wherever possible, over a distance of…

options.a: 600 m from the runway threshold and a crossbar at 300 m from the threshold.
options.b: 600 m from the runway threshold and a crossbar at 450 m from the runway threshold.
options.c: 420 m from the runway threshold and a crossbar at 250 m from the threshold.
options.d: 900 m from the runway threshold and a crossbar at 300 m from the threshold.
